what_it_does: Defines a 24x24 SVG outline icon using currentColor strokes, depicting a lamp and sofa composition.
observations: The SVG uses a 24 by 24 viewBox with no fill and currentColor stroke inheritance.
Stroke styling is set on the root with 1.5 width, round caps, and round joins.
The image is built from five path elements: a lampshade, lamp stem, sofa outline, rectangular base, and a side/arm detail.
standouts: The file contains no text, metadata, scripts, or embedded styling.
conventions: Uses inline SVG geometry with shared root stroke attributes.
Follows an outline icon convention with fill="none" and rounded stroke terminals.
Uses absolute path commands with some relative arc syntax.
concerns: No title, desc, role, or aria attributes are present in the SVG itself.
notes: A small currentColor outline SVG for a combined lamp and sofa icon.
questions: Is this SVG intended to be decorative only, given the absence of embedded accessibility labeling?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename indicates a lamp-sofa icon, and the SVG content depicts a lamp and sofa form.
intention_signals: It seems intended to provide a simple furniture/interior icon that can inherit color from surrounding UI context.
novelty: Combines a lamp and sofa into one small outline symbol rather than representing either object alone.
contribution: Contributes a reusable currentColor outline asset for representing interior seating and lighting in a fused design ledger.
summary_for_embedding: This is a 24x24 currentColor SVG outline icon composed of five paths depicting a lamp and sofa.
intention_for_embedding: This was for a themeable UI icon representing interior furnishing or lounge-related content.
